case_names: RE/MAX PRESTIGE, a Real Estate Brokerage, and Its Broker, DAREN LONGs-s v. SUSAN L. MATTSON
summaries: RE/MAX PRESTIGE, a real estate brokerage, and its broker, DAREN LONGs-s v. SUSAN L. MATTSON. Seventh Judicial District, Bingham County Appeal from the District Court of the Seventh Judicial District, State of Idaho, Bingham County. Hon. Darren B. Simpson, District Judge. Judgment awarding damages, interest, costs, and attorney fees for breach of contract, affirmed.
case_name_shorts: Re/Max Prestige, Daren Long v. Susan L. Mattson

case_names: Dawn A. MacIosek v. Victor G. Dow
summaries: DAWN A. MACIOSEK v. VICTOR G. DOW. First Judicial District, Kootenai County judgment of the district court ordering partition of real property by sale and distribution of proceeds, affirmed.
case_name_shorts: Dawn A. Maciosek v. Victor G. Dow

case_names: Carmen Garshelis v. Aaron Dane Bennett. and Matt Joseph Vraspir
summaries: CARMEN GARSHELIS v. AARON DANE BENNETT. and MATT JOSEPH VRASPIR. Fourth Judicial District, Ada County Appeal from the District Court of the Fourth Judicial District, State of Idaho, Ada County. Hon. James Cawthon, District Judge. Amended judgment, affirmed in part, reversed in part, and remanded for further proceedings.

case_names: In the Matter Of: Jane Doe I, a Child Under Eighteen 18 Years of Age. STATE OF IDAHO, DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND WELFARE v. JOHN DOE 2025-27
summaries: In the Matter of: Jane Doe I, A Child Under Eighteen 18 Years of Age. STATE OF IDAHO, DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND WELFARE v. JOHN DOE 2025-27, . Third Judicial District, Canyon County Appeal from the Magistrate Division of the District Court of the Third Judicial District, State of Idaho, Canyon County. Hon. Courtnie R. Tucker, Magistrate.
